revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ar:إبيسو (توضيح)]][[de:Ebisu (Begriffsklärung)]][[en:Ebisu]][[es:Ebisu]][[fa:ابیسو (ابهام‌زدایی)]][[fr:Ebisu]][[id:Ebisu (disambiguasi)]][[it:Ebisu]][[ja:えびす (曖昧さ回避)]][[ko:에비스]][[nl:Ebisu]][[sv:Ebisu]][[th:เอบิซุ]][[zh:惠比壽 (消歧義)]]
{{wikt|Ebisu|qq=}} '''Ebisu''', also transliterated '''Yebisu''', may refer to: * {{ill|Ebisu (mythology)|en|Ebisu (mythology)|qid=Q1129330|lt=Ebisu (mythology)|1=Ebisu (mythology)}}, a god of Japanese mythology * {{ill|Ebisu, Shibuya|en|Ebisu, Shibuya|qid=Q1203521|lt=Ebisu, Shibuya|1=Ebisu, Shibuya}}, a neighborhood in Tokyo, Japan * {{ill|Ebisu Station (Tokyo)|en|Ebisu Station (Tokyo)|qid=Q800715|lt=Ebisu Station (Tokyo)|1=Ebisu Station (Tokyo)}}, a train station located in Tokyo's Shibuya ward, Japan * [[:en:Ebisu Station (Hyogo)|Ebisu Station (Hyogo)]], a train station located in Miki, Hyōgo, Japan * [[:en:Yebisu|Yebisu]], a brand of Japanese beer * {{ill|Ebisu Circuit|en|Ebisu Circuit|qid=Q5331869|lt=Ebisu Circuit|1=Ebisu Circuit}}, a motorsport circuit in Fukushima Prefecture, Japan * {{ill|Evisu|en|Evisu|qid=Q3274777|lt=Evisu|1=Evisu}}, Japanese jeans brand * Ebisu, an alternate pronunciation of the {{ill|Emishi|en|Emishi|qid=Q932574|lt=Emishi|1=Emishi}} people who lived in northeastern Honshū, Japan * Ebisu, a character from the manga and anime series ''Naruto''; see {{ill|List of Naruto characters|en|List of Naruto characters|qid=Q718482|lt=List of ''Naruto'' characters|1=List of Naruto characters}} ==People with the surname== * {{ill|Etsunobu Ebisu|en|Etsunobu Ebisu|qid=Q5404936|lt=Etsunobu Ebisu|1=Etsunobu Ebisu}}, Japanese video game producer *{{Nihongo|{{ill|Nobuyuki Ebisu|en|Nobuyuki Ebisu|qid=Q11495342|lt=Nobuyuki Ebisu|1=Nobuyuki Ebisu}}|戎 信行||born 1972|qq=}}, Japanese baseball player * {{nihongo|{{ill|Yoshikazu Ebisu|en|Yoshikazu Ebisu|qid=Q11625592|lt=Yoshikazu Ebisu|1=Yoshikazu Ebisu}}|蛭子能収||born 1947|qq=}}, Japanese manga artist and actor {{disambig|surname|qq=}}
[[en:Ebisu]]
<!--Ebisu--><!--Ebisu--> <!--enwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[ar:إبيسو (توضيح)]] [[de:Ebisu (Begriffsklärung)]] [[es:Ebisu]] [[fa:ابیسو (ابهام‌زدایی)]] [[fr:Ebisu]] [[id:Ebisu (disambiguasi)]] [[it:Ebisu]] [[ja:えびす (曖昧さ回避)]] [[ko:에비스]] [[nl:Ebisu]] [[sv:Ebisu]] [[th:เอบิซุ]] [[zh:惠比壽 (消歧義)]] {{wikidata link|Q255907}} [[Category:All disambiguation pages]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
